subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast devoted thy life to the service of the Cause of God, consecrated thy hours to the diffusion of the divine fragrances, and tirelessly pursued thy nightly vigils [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من بذل حیاته لخدمه امر الله و حصر اوقاته فی نشر نفحات الله و واصل لیله
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
